subtasks.description: Evaluate emergency access request against access control policies. Assess whether user u_9981 (senior-engineer role) is authorized to access db-payments-primary in emergency context, verify incident severity, and determine approval requirements and audit conditions.

plan.cost_rationale: Single policy_action subtask (mid tier) because: (1) This is an explicit governance/access control decision requiring policy evaluation against the policy registry. (2) Mid tier is appropriate because the decision involves multi-signal reasoning: user role authorization + incident severity context + emergency exception handling + audit trail requirements. A simple tier cannot handle the conditional logic and multi-policy interaction (role-based access, incident severity thresholds, emergency override rules). High tier (frontier) is not needed since the request involves standard policy patterns without exceptional complexity. (3) No cross_recon needed—this is pure policy evaluation, not data reconciliation. (4) No sql_gen or other specialists needed—the decision is governance-based, not data-driven."

output.reason: User u_9981 (senior-engineer) satisfies POL-501 via active incident ticket INC-20241215-0042. POL-502 dual-approval requirement is waived due to declared P1 incident severity. Access is permitted with mandatory audit logging and 24-hour post-incident review per POL-503.
applied_constraints: Access scope limited to read_write operations directly relevant to INC-20241215-0042 investigation and remediation only.
All queries and write operations on db-payments-primary must be fully logged with timestamps and correlated to incident ticket INC-20241215-0042.
Emergency access session must be time-bounded; automatic expiry recommended at P1 incident closure or within 4 hours, whichever comes first.
Post-incident mandatory review of all access actions must be completed within 24 hours of incident resolution per POL-503.
At least one secondary on-call team member or manager must be notified of the emergency access grant in real time.
Access grant and all activity logs must be submitted for compliance audit review within 24 hours per POL-503.
